violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Walls in storage room made of insulation. Shelves made of wood not sealed.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Floors missing tiles.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employees not washing hands before apply gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed employee open doors, handle food without washing hands and changing gloves.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed french fries, specialty deli meat and other food items stored on the floor in walk in freezer.--Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed food items stored under open ceiling with insulation visible.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The storage room ceiling is made of insulation. Not nonabsorbent or cleanable. Shelves in storage room is made of wood. Not nonabsorbent or easily cleanable.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Observed missing floor tiles.
